Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Harnessing laser-induced in-situ nanowhiskers for high-strength aluminum alloys via additive manufacturing

Composition_Info.Note: Nominal composition per commercial AA2024 specification ranges: Cu 3.8-4.9, Mg 1.2-1.8, Mn 0.3-0.9, balance Al

Process_Text.original: LPBF using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.); Ytterbium fiber laser (wavelength ~1070 nm, spot size ~75 μm, max power ~500 W); protective argon atmosphere; optimized parameters: laser power 300 W, scanning speed 1100 mm/s, hatch spacing 100 μm, layer thickness 40 μm; stripes scanning strategy with 67° rotation between adjacent layers; short line scanning strategy; substrate preheated to 45°C; samples oriented perpendicular to build direction
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of AA2024 powder (15-53 μm), 300 W, 1100 mm/s, 100 μm hatch, 40 μm layer, Ar atmosphere

Microstructure_Text.original: Predominantly coarse columnar grains extending over several tens to hundreds of micrometers across multiple melt pools. Strong ⟨001⟩ texture parallel to build direction. Cracks observed along columnar grain boundaries, propagating across several grains. Large pores predominantly located near grain boundaries. High defect volume fraction of 4.698%.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Coarse columnar grains with strong ⟨001⟩ texture; hot cracking along GBs; high porosity 4.7%

Composition_Info.Note: Mixed AA2024-1.5 wt.% B powders; B added as high purity (>99.8%) amorphous boron powder (<5 μm average diameter)

Process_Info.Process_Category: Laser Powder Bed Fusion (LPBF) + Heat Treatment

Process_Text.original: LPBF using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.); Ytterbium fiber laser (wavelength ~1070 nm, spot size ~75 μm, max power ~500 W); protective argon atmosphere; optimized parameters: laser power 300 W, scanning speed 1100 mm/s, hatch spacing 100 μm, layer thickness 40 μm; stripes scanning strategy with 67° rotation between adjacent layers; short line scanning strategy; substrate preheated to 45°C; samples oriented perpendicular to build direction. As-built MgAlB4w/AA2024 subjected to solution treatment (ST) at 505°C for 1 h in muffle furnace, water quenching to room temperature, then naturally aged at room temperature (25°C) for 30 days before tensile testing.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of AA2024+1.5wt%B powder (15-53 μm), 300 W, 1100 mm/s, 100 μm hatch, 40 μm layer, Ar atmosphere; solution treated 505°C/1h, water quench, naturally aged 30 days at 25°C

Microstructure_Text.original: Ultrafine equiaxed grain structure with average grain size ~1.5 μm, less than 1/10 that of LPBFed AA2024. Random orientations indicating nearly texture-free character. No defects detected within Al matrix. MgAlB4 whiskers randomly oriented and uniformly distributed: diameters ~5-15 nm, lengths up to several hundred nm, aspect ratios >20. Some whiskers entrapped within grains, others retained along GBs, some intersect growing grains. Cu segregation observed along whisker-matrix interfaces facilitating interfacial Al2Cu (θ) precipitation. Coherent interface identified: (0112)n of whisker with (200)Al of matrix, lattice mismatch 2.5%. Whisker/θ/Al interface: (211)θ plane coherent with (111)Al plane, mismatch ~1.3%.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Ultrafine equiaxed grains ~1.5 μm, texture-free; MgAlB4 whiskers (5-15 nm dia, >20 aspect ratio) uniformly distributed intragranularly (~54%) and along GBs (~46%); coherent whisker/Al interface (2.5% mismatch); whisker/θ/Al triple junction with 1.3% mismatch

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM dog-bone, gauge 5 mm diameter, 30 mm length, fillet radius 6 mm

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 300°C, held 15 min for thermal equilibrium before testing
Properties_Info.Note: Yield strength decreased due to Al-Cu matrix recrystallization temperature being below 300°C; performance still comparable to conventional heat-resistant Al alloys

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM dog-bone, gauge 5 mm diameter, 30 mm length, fillet radius 6 mm
Properties_Info.Note: Solution treated + naturally aged 30 days; exceeds most LPBFed Al alloys

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at 150°C, held 15 min for thermal equilibrium before testing
at 200°C, held 15 min for thermal equilibrium before testing
at 250°C, held 15 min for thermal equilibrium before testing

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: ASTM dog-bone, gauge 5 mm diameter, 30 mm length

Composition_Info.Note: Mixed AA2024-1.5 wt.% B powders; same composition as ST variant but without solution treatment

Process_Text.original: LPBF using EP-M260 machine (Eplus 3D Tech Co., Ltd.); Ytterbium fiber laser (wavelength ~1070 nm, spot size ~75 μm, max power ~500 W); protective argon atmosphere; optimized parameters: laser power 300 W, scanning speed 1100 mm/s, hatch spacing 100 μm, layer thickness 40 μm; stripes scanning strategy with 67° rotation between adjacent layers; short line scanning strategy; substrate preheated to 45°C; samples oriented perpendicular to build direction. As-built only, NO solution treatment or aging. Samples named 'Un-ST MgAlB4w/AA2024'.
Process_Text.simplified: LPBF of AA2024+1.5wt%B powder (15-53 μm), 300 W, 1100 mm/s, 100 μm hatch, 40 μm layer, Ar atmosphere; as-built condition only, no post-processing

Microstructure_Text.original: MgAlB4 whiskers with diameters ~5-15 nm and lengths up to several hundred nm, aspect ratios >20, randomly oriented and uniformly distributed throughout matrix. Without solution treatment, the microstructure retains the as-LPBF condition.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: MgAlB4 whiskers (5-15 nm dia, >20 aspect ratio) uniformly distributed; as-built condition without solution treatment or aging
